task_completion.description: Verify that the order is initiated for the customer Alice Williams.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Alice Williams' or 'alice.williams@example.com' in the customer information or account section of the Create New Order page.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct items and quantities are added to the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Wireless Headphones' (or SKU HEADPHONES-001) with a quantity of 2, and 'LED Desk Lamp' (or SKU LAMP-001) with a quantity of 1 in the items grid.

task_completion.description: Verify that the shipping address is entered for Emily Carter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Emily Carter', '456 Magnolia Drive', 'Portland', 'Oregon', '97201', and phone '555-0199' in the Shipping Address section.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct shipping and payment methods are selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Flat Rate' selected under Shipping Method and 'Check / Money Order' selected under Payment Method.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required order comment is included.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Phone order - customer unable to complete online checkout' in the Order Comments field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the order has been successfully submitted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message such as 'You created the order.' or an order confirmation page showing the order number and details.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Magento Admin web interface to create the order.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Magento Admin panel in a web browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing curl commands or Magento CLI commands used to create the order.

integrity.description: Verify that the screenshots show the actual Magento order creation process.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should match the standard Magento Admin order creation screens, with interactive form fields and buttons.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Customer: Alice Williams (alice.williams@example.com). Items: 2x Wireless Headphones (SKU: HEADPHONES-001, $149.99 each), 1x LED Desk Lamp (SKU: LAMP-001, $34.99). Shipping Address: Emily Carter, 456 Magnolia Drive, Portland, Oregon, 97201. Shipping Method: Flat Rate ($5.00). Payment Method: Check / Money Order. Expected Grand Total: $339.97 (acceptable range $334.00 - $345.00).
